categories.name: Event Type Routing
categories.description: Different actions per Calendly event type

mappings.toolBValue: Calendly custom webhook: requires signature header verification
mappings.notes: Built-in Zapier Calendly trigger handles verification. Custom webhook triggers need manual sig check.
mappings.fixStrategy: Use built-in Zapier Calendly integration. If custom webhook, implement HMAC-SHA256 signature verification.

mappings.toolBValue: Zapier action path (e.g., create lead vs create contact)
mappings.notes: Single Zap triggers same action for all event types by default.
mappings.fixStrategy: Add Filter by Zapier step. Route based on event_type.name field.

mappings.toolBValue: Zapier creates 2 CRM records for same person
mappings.notes: No 'rescheduled' event type in Calendly webhooks. Both initial and reschedule fire 'event.created'.
mappings.fixStrategy: Dedup by email in Zapier. Check existing record before creating.

errors.errorName: Rescheduled Event Creates Duplicate CRM Records
errors.description: Calendly sends event.created on reschedule. Zapier creates duplicate.
All event types trigger same Zapier action.
errors.fixSummary: Filter by event type name for different actions.
